title: rosa × beanii
intro: Rosa × beanii, also known as the hybrid tea rose, is a cross between the Rosa multiflora and Rosa moschata, resulting in a fragrant and ornamental flowering plant. The medicinal properties of Rosa × beanii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress, improve mood, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Rosa × beanii can be prepared as herbal tea, essential oil, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible addition to a holistic health regimen.
